creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 160316
redir_onlink_11_rev1.diff

I rebased the 10 patch against CURRENT.  To get it to compile I replaced L3_ADDR with lltable_fill_sa_entry() and rtexpunge(rt) with rt_expunge(rnh, rt).  Other that compiling, it has not been tested.  I've sent it off to the folks at Isilon with the TAHI rig to be tested.  More details as I hear them.
